response.global_analysis: The audio features a medley of three songs by Hololive 3rd Generation members. 1. 'Interact Fantasia' (00:00-01:05), 2. 'Kyou wa kono mama' (01:13-03:32), and 3. 'Hide Seek ~Nakayoku Kenkashina!~' (03:33-end). The vocal audio matches the reference song titles identified in the JSON. Timing is strictly tied to the audio vocalizations, with segmentation following natural pauses in the music and speech.

subtitles.original: 揺らいでも頑張っちゃ
subtitles.english: Even if I falter, I'll do my best

subtitles.original: 褒められて伸びるわ分かってるよね
subtitles.english: I grow with praise, you know that, right?

subtitles.original: この場所が宝物
subtitles.english: This place is a treasure

subtitles.original: 泣いちゃわないよう笑おう
subtitles.english: Let's laugh so we don't cry

subtitles.original: 君と一緒に！
subtitles.english: Together with you!

subtitles.original: 超アイドル 3rdガールは欲張り
subtitles.english: Super idols, 3rd Girls are greedy

subtitles.original: 愛されたいし夢も見てみたい 君じゃなきゃ
subtitles.english: Want to be loved and dream too, it has to be you

subtitles.original: ヤダって 絶好調で願い撃ちで君にウインク
subtitles.english: Or I'll say no! In top form, I'll shoot a wish and wink

subtitles.original: やっぱ3rdガールでめっちゃハッピー
subtitles.english: As expected, being a 3rd Girl makes me so happy

subtitles.original: あれもしたいしこれもしたいし叶っちゃう
subtitles.english: I want to do this and that, and it'll all come true

subtitles.original: 全力で走る もちろん君と
subtitles.english: I'll run with all my might, of course with you

subtitles.original: 笑いあってもっと可愛くなる
subtitles.english: Laughing together, I'll become even cuter

subtitles.original: どこまででも行けちゃう気がする
subtitles.english: I feel like I can go anywhere

subtitles.original: 今日はこのままさよならじゃないよ
subtitles.english: Today isn't goodbye just like this

subtitles.original: 手を取ってくれたなら
subtitles.english: If you've taken my hand

subtitles.original: 秘密も眠りにつくような夜に
subtitles.english: On a night where even secrets fall asleep

subtitles.original: 君を連れていくよ
subtitles.english: I will take you away

subtitles.original: それは例えば遠く離れてたって
subtitles.english: For example, even if we are far apart

subtitles.original: 手を繋いでいられるような
subtitles.english: So that we can stay holding hands

subtitles.original: 奇跡のような話をしよう
subtitles.english: Let's talk about something like a miracle

subtitles.original: 窓は開けといて
subtitles.english: Keep the window open

subtitles.original: 今日までを思いだして
subtitles.english: Recalling everything up until today

subtitles.original: ひとつひとつ並べたら
subtitles.english: If I line them up one by one

subtitles.original: 明日の雨が気になりだして
subtitles.english: I start to worry about tomorrow's rain

subtitles.original: どうも眠れないみたいだ
subtitles.english: It seems I can't sleep at all

subtitles.original: 変わりたくないことや
subtitles.english: Things I don't want to change

subtitles.original: 変わらなきゃいけないことも
subtitles.english: And things that must change

subtitles.original: 少しは忘れたまま窓の外
subtitles.english: Leaving them behind a bit, out the window

subtitles.original: 眺めていたんだ
subtitles.english: I was gazing out

subtitles.original: 雨が降り出すその前に
subtitles.english: Before the rain starts to fall

subtitles.original: 君のところまで行けるような
subtitles.english: I feel like I can make it

subtitles.original: 気がして
subtitles.english: to where you are

subtitles.original: 目を閉じてみたんだ
subtitles.english: I tried closing my eyes

subtitles.original: このまま遠くへと行こう
subtitles.english: Let's go far away just like this

subtitles.original: 手を取ってくれるかな
subtitles.english: Will you take my hand?

subtitles.original: 秘密も眠りにつくような夜を
subtitles.english: A night where even secrets fall asleep

subtitles.original: 君と泳いでいくよ
subtitles.english: I'll swim through it with you

subtitles.original: 街の明かりが消えるたびに笑って
subtitles.english: Laughing every time the city lights go out

subtitles.original: 路地裏で立ち会おう
subtitles.english: Let's meet in the back alley

subtitles.original: バカみたいな話をしよう
subtitles.english: Let's talk about something silly

subtitles.original: 窓は開けといて
subtitles.english: Keep the window open

subtitles.original: 聞こえる
subtitles.english: I can hear it

subtitles.original: 聞こえる
subtitles.english: I can hear it

subtitles.original: 次は、マリン！
subtitles.english: Next is Marine!

subtitles.original: 君たち、二日目も盛り上がっていきますよ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, let's keep the energy up on day two!

subtitles.original: いいわしゃーまりん！
subtitles.english: Ready to go, Marine!

subtitles.original: どっちが好きなのよ！
subtitles.english: Which one do you like?!

subtitles.original: 何とかなんないかな
subtitles.english: Can't we do something about this?

subtitles.original: 隣のあいつが邪魔だな
subtitles.english: That guy next to me is in the way

subtitles.original: 行くないそんなこと
subtitles.english: Don't go doing that

subtitles.original: ダメダメだ 全力疾走絶対
subtitles.english: No, no, no! Sprints are a must

subtitles.original: ドバドバ違うな 何だって競争
subtitles.english: Overflowing, no, it's a competition regardless

subtitles.original: 苦手だそういうの
subtitles.english: I'm not good at that kind of thing
